message:
fix(engine): enforce trace finalization before deterministic replay to prevent replaying incomplete captures

Adds a validation gate requiring NondeterminismTrace to be finalised before
replay operations are permitted, preventing subtle correctness issues from
replaying traces where the capture was interrupted mid-stream.

deterministic_replay.rs:
- Add NondeterminismTrace::validate_for_replay() returning
  Err(ReplayError::TraceNotFinalised) for non-finalised traces
- ReplayEngine::replay_next() calls validate_for_replay() before
  processing any event
- ReplayEngine::is_complete() now requires trace.is_finalised() in
  addition to cursor exhaustion
- All unit tests updated to call trace.finalise() before creating
  ReplayEngine instances
- New test: replay_unfinalised_trace_rejected

frankenctl.rs:
- execute_replay() validates trace before beginning replay sequence

deterministic_replay_integration.rs:
- make_trace() helper calls finalise() after capturing events
- All integration tests that create traces now call finalise()
- New integration test: replay_unfinalised_trace_rejected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
